## Pre-Commit Checklist

### Must Pass (block commit if any fail)
- [ ] All unit tests pass (`pytest` / `npm test` / `go test ./...` / `./gradlew test`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`npm run build` / `go build ./...` / `./gradlew build`)
- [ ] No lint errors
- [ ] TDD cycle was followed — test was RED before implementation
- [ ] Commit is atomic — one logical change only
- [ ] No SOLID violations (see solid pack checklist)
- [ ] No code quality violations (see code-quality pack checklist)
- [ ] Commit message: `type(scope): description`
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in staged files

### Recommended (flag if skipping)
- [ ] Unit test coverage ≥ 80% for changed modules
- [ ] New public API has documentation
